title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ANTIQUE SCHOOL OF FISHERIES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIBIAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO TARIO LIM MEMORIAL ANTIQUE SCHOOL OF FISHERIES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1992 / 55 OG No. 36, 7632 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2481, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ANTIQUE SCHOOL OF FISHERIES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIBIAO, PROVINCE OF ANTIQUE, TO TARIO LIM MEMORIAL ANTIQUE SCHOOL OF FISHERIES.

Be it enacted by the Semite and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Antique School of Fisheries in the Municipality of Tibiao, Province of Antique, is hereby changed to Tario Lim Memorial Antique School of Fisheries.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
